AstroBis Solar System

Real-distance atlas, compressed for navigation

Planet positions use a logarithmic AU scale so the inner system, Kuiper belt, heliopause, and Oort Cloud can share one explorable scene.

Scale
Log AU
Planets
8
Dwarf worlds
5
Selected
Earth
Terrestrial planet

Earth

Only known inhabited world, with liquid oceans, plate tectonics, and a large stabilizing Moon.

Mean distance1 AU
Distance from Sun149,597,871 km
Diameter12,742 km
Radius1.00 Earth radii
Known moons1
Orbital period365.25 days
Day length23h 56m
Reference: NASA Solar System Exploration - Earth. Moon counts change as small irregular satellites are confirmed.
TIME WARP1.8xDrag to rotate. Scroll to travel outward. Click a world for details.
NASA/JPL data - texture maps: Solar System Scope / Wikimedia Commons where available
